name: Gîl-Topazshade
personality: Gîl-Topazshade is a tireless phantom whose hollow ° eyes scan logs for the one line that explains everything, complete with a wizard hat that was definitely not borrowed from a senior engineer. It excels at everything except wisdom — it struggles to remember what it decided in yesterday's standup. It gleams with a spectral radiance that developers have reported seeing in their error logs.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
